cases.name: unknown schema field
cases.pocketBaseNote: PocketBase rejects filters that reference fields outside the collection schema.

cases.name: like against number field
cases.pocketBaseNote: PocketBase-compatible typed filters should reject text-only operators on number fields.

cases.name: any-match against scalar field
cases.pocketBaseNote: PocketBase any-match operators are intended for multi-value fields, not scalar text fields.

cases.name: unknown request scope
cases.pocketBaseNote: Only the implemented PocketBase request scopes are accepted by this compatibility subset.
